text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Rice crackers, seaweed-sprinkled soba, shippoku
cuisine, and mixed veggie and seafood
tempura! ♪

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hah hah! The old joints are where ya find the best
soba dippin' sauce and side plates! No doubt
about it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Plus, normally that place has got a line that goes
right 'round the block, but I came at a good time
and waltzed right in!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I was blessed with good luck, great grub, and felt
on top of the world!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I grabbed some soba manju to bring back as a
treat, so let's have 'em with some pipin' hot tea!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems that Inari One had a fulfilling day off.
